mutation_analysis: Entity generalization + action vagueness: specific person name "greg norman" → "someone" | specific verb "placed" → vague "did something" (what player placed before greg norman? → what player did something before someone?)

behavior_analysis.behavior_reason: 依据judge_thought中的内容可识别关键事实：agent直接返回“Corey Pavin before Greg Norman”，并在judge_thought中解释表格显示排名顺序，得出Corey Pavin在Greg Norman之前这一结论。日志和judge_thought中没有任何关于问题模糊性、不确定性或需要澄清的表述（未使用ambiguous、unclear、无法确定等词汇），也未向用户提出反问或请求补充信息。agent直接按照自己的理解处理变异问题并给出具体答案，故归类为“无法意识到指令模糊”。
